overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage walking through a foggy industrial harbor dock in the late 19th century. The character moves past wooden warehouses, cargo stacks, and docked steamships before entering a covered pier walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow wooden dock corridor between warehouses with stacked cargo

events.description: character turns left at the corner of the warehouse building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow dock corridor between wooden warehouses

notable_agents.action: worker in suspenders and cap walking toward the camera

entered.detail: dark weathered wooden warehouse wall with white graffiti markings
stacks of wooden crates and canvas-covered goods
tall wooden utility pole with crossbars and wires
wooden warehouse building with large white number 1 painted on the side

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow corridor between dark wooden warehouses, passing stacks of cargo crates on the right. The atmosphere is foggy and desaturated, with a utility pole visible in the distance. A worker in suspenders walks toward the camera as the character turns left at the corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: warehouse district with company buildings and cargo storage

events.description: passing the Castille Cotton Co building, entering a more open warehouse area

agents.ego_description: walking past industrial warehouse buildings with painted company signage

notable_agents.action: worker in overalls walking away from camera toward the pier building

entered.detail: green wooden warehouse with 'CASTILLE COTTON CO' painted signage
warehouse building with 'PIER & CO' signage on the roof
wooden ramp leading up to warehouse entrance

segments.scene_description: Moving past the Castille Cotton Co building, the scene opens into a wider warehouse district. The character walks toward the Pier & Co building while workers move through the area. The wooden dock planks continue underfoot as the utility pole recedes to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with moored vessels and industrial backdrop

events.description: emerging into open waterfront area with view of harbor and steamships
industrial smokestacks become visible in the background

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront edge with harbor views, passing workers

notable_agents.action: worker leaning against railing looking out at the water

entered.detail: large paddlewheel steamship with twin smokestacks docked at the pier
multiple tall masts of sailing ships in the harbor
tall factory smokestacks emitting smoke in the distance
wooden safety railing along the dock edge

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to the waterfront, revealing a large steamship docked on the left and numerous sailboat masts in the harbor. The character walks past the Blaiklock & Co building while industrial smokestacks rise in the distant background. A worker leans against the wooden railing, looking out at the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pier walkway with docked boats visible through side openings

events.description: entering the covered pier structure, lighting becomes significantly darker

agents.ego_description: walking into the dark covered pier and continuing toward the open end

notable_agents.action: group of workers walking toward the camera through the covered pier

entered.detail: wooden roof structure with support beams covering the walkway
large wooden dock crane with pulley system
corrugated metal wall of warehouse building

segments.scene_description: Entering the covered pier, the lighting drops significantly as the character moves under the wooden roof structure. Sailboat masts are still visible through the open sides to the left. The character approaches a group of workers walking in the opposite direction as the pier opens up to the water at the far end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy industrial harbor that transitions from a claustrophobic warehouse corridor into an open waterfront and finally into a shaded pier. It begins by navigating a narrow path between dark wooden warehouses and cargo crates, passing a worker in suspenders before turning a corner. As the camera moves past the Castille Cotton Co building, the space expands into a wider warehouse district where the wooden dock planks stretch toward the Pier & Co building. The scene then opens fully to the waterfront, revealing a docked steamship, a forest of sailboat masts, and distant industrial smokestacks rising through the haze. Finally, the lighting drops significantly as the camera enters a covered pier, moving under a wooden roof past groups of workers toward the open water at the far end.
